data.body:
## Description

Modify `tests/scripts/test-ticket-compact.sh` to add tests for the --skip-sync flag and combined --threshold=0 --skip-sync invocation.

## File Impact
- Modify: `tests/scripts/test-ticket-compact.sh`

## TDD Requirement (RED)
- `test_compact_skip_sync_flag`: Set TICKET_SYNC_CMD to a command that writes a marker file, run compact with --skip-sync, verify marker file NOT created. Test approach: behavioral — verify sync side-effect is absent when flag is used.
- `test_compact_threshold_zero_with_skip_sync`: Create ticket with 2 events (CREATE + STATUS), run compact with --threshold=0 --skip-sync, verify SNAPSHOT event is created. RED because --skip-sync flag doesn't exist yet.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py
- [ ] Test file has new test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_compact_skip_sync\|test_compact_threshold_zero' tests/scripts/test-ticket-compact.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
- [ ] New tests fail (RED) because --skip-sync doesn't exist yet
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-compact.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL.*skip_sync'
